loopStyle: Effect-TS step loop (while(true) over process(); AI SDK streamText executes tools inline per step)

nodes.label: User message
nodes.note: prompt() **creates a user message** (createUserMessage), applies any per-call **tool allow/deny rules** to session.permission, then **enters loop() → runLoop()**.

nodes.label: runLoop step (while true)
nodes.note: The **macro agent loop**. Each iteration rebuilds messages, checks the last assistant finish reason: if it **finished without tool calls** (and isn't an orphaned interrupt) the **loop breaks**; otherwise it prepares tools and **runs another model step**. step is **capped by agent.steps** (maxSteps).

nodes.label: Resolve tool set
nodes.note: **SessionTools.resolve** builds **AI SDK tool({execute})** objects from the registry plus **MCP tools**. Each tool's execute is an Effect that may call **ctx.ask (the permission gate)** before doing work.

nodes.label: process() → streamText
nodes.note: **handle.process()** runs one model generation. The AI SDK **streamText** (no stopWhen/maxSteps set) streams one assistant turn; tools with execute are **dispatched inline** by the SDK. fullStream parts are adapted into **LLMEvents**.

nodes.label: Drain LLMEvent stream
nodes.note: process() pipes llm.stream through **handleEvent and runDrain**. tool-call / tool-result / tool-error / step-finish events are **folded into the message state** until the **step ends**.

nodes.label: ctx.ask → permission.ask
nodes.note: **Per-tool ruleset gate** invoked from inside a tool's execute (e.g. edit.ts:98, write.ts:54, shell.ts:281) and for every MCP tool (tools.ts:135). Evaluates rules: **deny → DeniedError** (error tool-result, loop continues); **allow → proceed silently**; otherwise publish permission.asked on the bus and **block on a Deferred** until the UI replies **once/always/reject**.

nodes.label: Run tool execute()
nodes.note: After **ctx.ask resolves allow**, the **tool body runs** (item.execute), fires tool.execute.before/after **plugin hooks**, and returns output. The AI SDK emits a **tool-result part** captured by completeToolCall.

nodes.label: Tool error / denial
nodes.note: If **execute throws** (including a permission DeniedError/RejectedError), the SDK **emits tool-error**; **failToolCall** records the error as the tool result. A **RejectedError** (interactive reject) sets ctx.blocked so process() **returns 'stop'**; a config DeniedError does not block.

nodes.label: process() result
nodes.note: process() returns **'compact'** (needs compaction), **'stop'** (blocked or errored), or **'continue'**. runLoop branches: stop → break; compact → schedule compaction and continue; continue → **next iteration re-prompts** the model with the tool results.

nodes.label: Loop exits
nodes.note: When the last assistant turn finished with **no pending tool calls** (or process returned stop), the **while(true) breaks** and **runLoop returns** the final assistant message.

scenarios.title: Model answers with **no tools**
scenarios.note: First step produces a **text-only assistant turn**. process() **returns 'continue'**, but the next loop iteration sees the assistant **finished with no tool calls** and **breaks**.

scenarios.title: User asks to **edit a file**
scenarios.note: The model **calls edit**; edit.ts:98 **invokes ctx.ask** for the 'edit' permission. Once allowed, the **edit runs** and its tool-result is folded in. The loop **re-prompts**; the **model finishes** without further tools and the loop exits.

scenarios.title: **Tool call is denied**
scenarios.note: ctx.ask → permission.ask **returns a DeniedError** (matching deny rule) or the user replies reject. The tool's **execute throws**, the SDK emits tool-error, and failToolCall records it as an **error tool-result**. A reject sets ctx.blocked → process() returns 'stop' and the **loop breaks**; a config deny instead **continues the loop** with the error fed back to the model (continue_loop_on_deny flips reject behavior to continue too).

scenarios.title: Model issues **several tool calls** in one turn
scenarios.note: A single streamText step emits **multiple tool-call parts**; the AI SDK executes each (each **gated by its own ctx.ask**) and emits the tool-results within the same step. process() **returns 'continue'**, the loop re-prompts with all results, and the **model finishes**.
